text: A train travels from city A to city B at 60 mph and returns at 90 mph. If the total trip takes 5 hours, what is the distance between city A and city B?

A pipe can fill a tank in 4 hours and another pipe can fill the same tank in 6 hours. A drain can empty the tank in 12 hours. If all three are open simultaneously, how many hours does it take to fill the tank?
Two workers together can complete a job in 6 days. Worker A alone takes 10 days longer than Worker B alone. How many days does it take Worker B to complete the job alone?
A chemist has a 30% acid solution and a 70% acid solution. How many liters of each must be mixed to produce 200 liters of a 45% acid solution?
Sarah is three times as old as her daughter. In 12 years, Sarah will be twice as old as her daughter. How old is Sarah now?
A boat travels 24 miles upstream in 3 hours and returns downstream in 2 hours. What is the speed of the current in mph?
A 50-liter tank is filled with a mixture that is 20% alcohol. How many liters of pure alcohol must be added to make the mixture 40% alcohol?
Two cars start from the same point and travel in opposite directions. Car A travels at 55 mph and Car B at 45 mph. After how many hours will they be 350 miles apart?
A store mixes coffee worth $8 per pound with coffee worth $12 per pound to make 40 pounds of a blend worth $9.50 per pound. How many pounds of the $8 coffee are used?
A man can row at 5 mph in still water. He rows 14 miles downstream and 14 miles back in a total of 6 hours. What is the speed of the river current?
Pipe A fills a pool in 8 hours, Pipe B fills it in 12 hours. After they work together for 3 hours, Pipe A is turned off. How many more hours does Pipe B need to finish filling the pool?
The sum of two numbers is 84 and one number is three more than twice the other. What is the larger of the two numbers?
A plane flies 1800 miles with the wind in 3 hours and against the wind in 4 hours. What is the speed of the wind in mph?

A tank has an inlet pipe that fills it in 5 hours and an outlet pipe that drains it in 8 hours. If the tank is half full and both pipes are open, how many hours will it take to fill the tank completely?
Maria is 4 years older than twice her brother's age. In 6 years, she will be 10 years older than her brother. How old is Maria now?

A car and a truck start from opposite ends of a 300-mile highway and drive toward each other. The car travels at 65 mph and the truck at 55 mph. How many miles from the car's starting point do they meet?
A solution of salt water is 15% salt. How many pounds of pure salt must be added to 60 pounds of this solution to make it 25% salt?
Worker A completes 1/3 of a task in 4 hours. Worker B completes 1/4 of the same task in 3 hours. Working together from the start, how many hours will it take them to complete the entire task?
A mixture of nuts contains cashews worth $9 per pound and almonds worth $6 per pound. If 30 pounds of the mixture is worth $7.50 per pound, how many pounds of cashews are in the mixture?
A father is currently 30 years older than his son. Five years ago, the father was four times as old as his son. How old is the father now?

Two trains leave different stations 400 miles apart and travel toward each other. Train 1 leaves 1 hour before Train 2. Train 1 travels at 70 mph and Train 2 at 80 mph. How far has Train 2 traveled when they meet?
A tank is 1/3 full. An inlet pipe can fill the empty tank in 9 hours and a drain can empty a full tank in 6 hours. With both pipes open, how many hours until the tank is empty?
A cyclist travels from town X to town Y, a distance of 60 miles. For the first 20 miles the speed is 15 mph, and for the rest the speed is 20 mph. What is the average speed for the entire trip?
A retailer mixes a 20% saline solution with a 5% saline solution to get 60 liters of a 12% saline solution. How many liters of the 20% solution are used?
Tom is 5 years older than Jerry. Four years ago, Tom was twice as old as Jerry was then. How old is Jerry now?
Three pipes A, B, and C can fill a cistern in 6, 8, and 12 hours respectively. All three are opened at once, but after 2 hours pipe C is closed. How many more hours does it take to fill the cistern?

A motorist drives to a destination at 50 mph and returns along the same route at 30 mph. If the return trip takes 40 minutes longer than the outward trip, how many miles is the destination from the starting point?
A mixture contains copper and zinc in the ratio 3 to 2. If 10 kg of copper is added, the ratio becomes 2 to 1. How many kg of zinc are in the original mixture?
Two pumps working together drain a pool in 3 hours and 20 minutes. The larger pump alone takes 5 hours to drain the pool. How many hours does the smaller pump take to drain the pool alone?
A train crosses a 240-meter-long bridge in 30 seconds and passes a stationary pole in 10 seconds. What is the length of the train in meters?
